titleStmt.title: Ceṉṉivaṉam, Sāliyavanēśvarar temple, Māṟavarman Sundara Pāṇḍya, year 5

summary.p: Land grant made by the inhabitats of Viyātaraiyaṉ-kōṭṭai for an image of Tiruvātavūr-Nāyaṇār (Māṇikkavācakar), which was set up by Sundara Pāṇḍya Paṭṭaṉ. The endowment includes food offerings, clothes and related items. The record is said to have been engraved on copper.

div.p: makkittikku meṟ śrī komāṟapaṉmar-āṉa tirupuvaṉa-c-cakkaravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭala muṅkoṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulacēkara-tēvaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 8 vatu Aippaci śrī

tiruttiyūr-muṭṭattu tiruccaṉṉavaṉattu Uṭaiyār tiruccaṉṉavaṉam-uṭaiya-nāyiṉār kōyilil tēvakaṉmi ciīkāriyañcevār śrī māheśvara-kaṇkāṇi cevārkaḷukku In-nāṭu viyātaraiyaṉ-kōṭṭai ḻaiñcca Ūravarōm piṭipāṭu paṇṇi kuṭutta paricāvatu

Inta nāyiṉār kōyilil muppatu vaṭṭattu civa-p-pirāmaṇaril ceya
yāṉ Imametaruvāṉ-āṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya-paṭṭaṉ In-nāyaṉār kōyilil Ēṟiaruḷa-p paṇṇiṉa tiruvātavūr nāyaṉāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭaṉ itta nimantatukku vakaḷ viṭṭa nilam āvatu viyataraiyaṉ kōṭṭai vayalil periya-kuḷatil veḷḷuruva maṭaiyāl nirpāyum E kaḷ kāṇi cila viṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭu patu kiḻpāṟkellai naṭuvillempa-k kuḷattil nānāḷukku meṟkum teṉ pāṟkellai paṟaiyaṉ kāṇi
tēvaṉ kāḷaiyār Uḻutu pōtukiṟa taṭi Iraṇṭum mututaricāṉa taṭi Iraṇṭukkum vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai muṉpu tiruvilaiku-p-puṟam āka viṭṭa tēvatāṉa-paṟṟil vā ttuṭaval varampukku kiḻakkum pa tēvatāṉam Ālāla cuntaraṉ vaykkal kiḻ rampukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟk kellai It-tēvatāṉam vaṭavarampuvanta cevuṟaikkut teṟkkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaikk' uṭpaṭṭa palataṭiyāl Ēṟṟa-c curukkam Uṭpaṭa nilam Iraṇṭumāvum In-nāyaṉāṟkku kārāḻvai
kavum Inta cuntarāpāṇṭiya paṭṭaṇukku kāṇi Āvatu Ākavum In-nāyaṉāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉattukkum Iṟaiyili kārāḻmai Āka niīrvārttu Eṅkaḷuūr puravil kaḻittu viṭṭamaikku cantirāticcavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭi-k kuṭuttōm tiruvātavūr-nāyiṉārku viyātaraiyaṉ kōṭṭai Ūrkku camainta Ūravarōm Ip-paṭikku Añcāta kaṇṭapparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku muṭitāṅkirāmaṉ Eḻuttu

app.note: See parallel inscription in the same temple, following regnal year.

div.p: This edition by Renato Dávalos (2026), based on .
